name: supercompact
description: Entity-preservation conversation compaction - replaces /compact with ~400x faster, 2x better entity retention via EITF scoring

budget_mode.label: Budget Mode
budget_mode.description: Auto uses percentage of current size; manual uses fixed token count

budget_pct.label: Compact To %
budget_pct.description: Target size as percentage of current conversation (auto mode)

budget_pct_preemptive.label: Preemptive %
budget_pct_preemptive.description: Target size for preemptive Layer 1 compaction (auto mode)

threshold_bytes.label: Trigger Threshold
threshold_bytes.description: File size in bytes that triggers preemptive compaction
